execution_notes: MCP Supabase opera no processo principal do Claude Code, nao em subagentes isolados. Credenciais nao estao disponiveis como env vars de shell (.env.local ausente no filesystem). Queries 100% validadas contra schema real (migration 20260513_waitlist_leads.sql). Para executar: (1) Supabase Dashboard > SQL Editor com service_role, (2) Claude Code principal com MCP Supabase ativo, ou (3) adicionar .env.local com NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.

schema_notes.step_logic: Etapa 2 = campos de qualificacao preenchidos: segment, size, revenue_band, business_name ou pain IS NOT NULL. Sem coluna 'step' nem 'step2_at' no schema real.
schema_notes.proxy_for_step2_completion: segment IS NOT NULL OR size IS NOT NULL OR revenue_band IS NOT NULL OR business_name IS NOT NULL
schema_notes.proxy_for_step2_time: updated_at - created_at FILTER WHERE segment IS NOT NULL AND updated_at > created_at

queries_adapted.q1_leads_24h_by_utm: SELECT utm_source, COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE segment IS NOT NULL OR size IS NOT NULL OR revenue_band IS NOT NULL OR business_name IS NOT NULL) as completed_step_2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY utm_source ORDER BY total DESC;
queries_adapted.q2_total_accumulated: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_all_time FROM waitlist_leads;
queries_adapted.q3_growth_7d: SELECT DATE(created_at) as day, COUNT(*) as leads_day, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE segment IS NOT NULL OR size IS NOT NULL OR revenue_band IS NOT NULL OR business_name IS NOT NULL) as completed_step_2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY day DESC;
queries_adapted.q4_avg_time_step2: SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at))/60) FILTER (WHERE segment IS NOT NULL AND updated_at > created_at) as avg_minutes_to_step2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
queries_adapted.q5_top_utms: SELECT utm_source, COUNT(*) as total FROM waitlist_leads GROUP BY utm_source ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5;
queries_adapted.q6_avg_daily_7d: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / 7.0, 1) as avg_daily_7d FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';

digest_text: DIGEST BLOQUEADO -- acesso DB indisponivel neste contexto de execucao. Queries validadas contra schema real disponíveis em queries_adapted. Executar manualmente no Supabase Dashboard ou via Claude Code principal.
